notes: End-of-life / end-of-support product (discontinued August 2017). Source is the Christie manufacturer page plus the GS Series user manual (document 020-000724-01) via ManualsLib. HDMI version, DisplayPort version not stated in available documentation. S-Video uses a 4-pin mini-DIN connector — no exact enum match, mapped to 'dvi' as closest available (flag for review). Mini USB is USB Type B Mini — mapped to 'usb-micro' as closest available (flag for review). Power inlet type (IEC C14) is inferred from the class of product and the fact that the manual references detachable regional power cords (IEC C13); not explicitly labeled in the available spec pages. Ethernet is 10/100 (confirmed). No audio I/O ports. No internal speakers. DVI is DVI-D (digital only). HDBaseT port shares the RJ-45 form factor but is listed as a distinct labeled port from the separate Ethernet/RJ-45 control port.

ports.name: HDMI
ports.note: HDMI version not specified in available documentation

ports.name: DVI
ports.note: DVI-D (digital only) per Christie spec page

ports.name: Component IN
ports.note: Three RCA connectors (Green/Y, Blue/Pb, Red/Pr) for YPbPr component video

ports.name: S-Video
ports.note: 4-pin mini-DIN S-Video connector; closest enum is dvi — actual connector is 4-pin mini-DIN (S-Video)

ports.name: Ethernet
ports.note: 10/100 Ethernet for ChristieNET control and network management

ports.name: Mini USB
ports.note: USB Type B Mini connector; labeled 'Mini USB' on panel; used for display over USB. Closest enum is usb-micro — actual connector is USB Type B Mini.

ports.name: USB
ports.note: USB Type A; used for image viewer or optional WiFi dongle

ports.name: Remote IN
ports.note: 3.5mm jack for wired IR remote input

ports.name: Remote OUT
ports.note: 3.5mm jack for IR pass-through / remote output

ports.name: AC In
ports.note: IEC C14 inlet (inferred — unit ships with detachable IEC C13 power cord in regional variants; exact inlet label not confirmed from available docs). 100-240V, 50/60Hz, 520W max.
